description: Conditions that alter a WorkUnit/Block (§5.17). Spec examples plus joint_angle / box_height / target_height — the isometric-position and jump/throw-target cases the model otherwise has no canonical home for (METHODOLOGY-VALIDATION G4/G5).

tokens.label: Blood-Flow Restriction
tokens.description: Cuff/band restriction; value MAY carry cuff pressure (unit e.g. mm[Hg]).

tokens.label: Altitude
tokens.description: Hypoxic/altitude condition; value MAY carry elevation (m).

tokens.label: Heat
tokens.description: Elevated ambient temperature; value MAY carry temperature.

tokens.label: Cold
tokens.description: Low ambient temperature; value MAY carry temperature.

tokens.label: Accommodating Band
tokens.description: Added band tension on a barbell movement.

tokens.label: Chains
tokens.description: Added chain weight on a barbell movement.

tokens.label: Paused
tokens.description: An enforced pause in the lift; value MAY carry pause seconds (or use phasePattern).

tokens.label: Joint Angle
tokens.description: Fixed joint angle for an isometric/partial (e.g. pin press at 90°); value carries degrees (unit deg).

tokens.label: Box Height
tokens.description: Box/platform height for jumps/step-ups; value carries height.

tokens.label: Target Height
tokens.description: Target height for wall-ball/throw; value carries height.

tokens.label: Edge Depth
tokens.description: Fingerboard/hangboard edge depth; value carries depth (unit mm).
